prog.name: prog
prog.desc: Manages scheduled messages with repetition (daily, monthly, etc.).
prog.usage_msg:
*Schedule message sending*
{sep}
1️⃣ *CREATE A TASK*
🔹 *Private*:
  `{prefixe}prog pm num=xxx`
  `date="..." msg="..."`

🔹 *Group*:
  `{prefixe}prog gc jid=xxx`
  `date="..." msg="..."`

2️⃣ *MANAGEMENT*
◽ *List*: `{prefixe}prog list`
◽ *Delete*: `{prefixe}prog supp [ID]`
◽ *Clear*: `{prefixe}prog clear`
{inter}
🔁 *REPETITION*:
once, daily, monthly, yearly
prog.clear_success:
🧹 PROG
All tasks have been deleted.
prog.supp_not_found:
❌ ERROR
No task found with ID: {id}
prog.not_in_group: ❌ I am not in this group.
prog.future_date: ⏳ Date must be in the future!
